identity.name: NEXIQ
identity.aesthetic: Dark Mode Tech, Neon Accents, Glassmorphism, Bento Grids

rules: Headings: tracking-tight (-0.02em to -0.04em). Leading-none for sizes above 4xl.
Labels: uppercase, tracking-widest, text-xs, font-semibold, text-muted-foreground.
Code: usage of font-mono for all technical terms, snippets, and token counts.

layout_rules: Use 'container mx-auto' with 'px-4 md:px-6' for max-width constraints.
Sidebar width: w-64 (256px) fixed on desktop, slide-over on mobile.
Chat container: max-w-3xl mx-auto for readability.

hero_abstract.usage: Hero section background or feature graphic

code_screen.alt: Close up of code on screen

variants.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)] transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-input/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 transition-all duration-200

chat_bubble.ai: bg-muted text-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm border border-border/50

layout_patterns.landing_hero: Centered H1 with 'text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-white to-gray-500'. Subtext 'text-xl text-muted-foreground'. Two CTA buttons (Primary & Outline). Background: 'hero_glow' gradient.
layout_patterns.bento_grid: Grid cols-1 md:cols-3 gap-4. Feature cards with icons on top-left, text bottom-left. Use 'col-span-2' for major features.
layout_patterns.chat_interface: Sidebar (Left, Fixed). Chat Window (Center, Scrollable). Input Area (Bottom, Fixed, Floating Glass). Top Bar (Model Selector, User Profile).

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}

rules: Focus rings must be visible (ring-2 ring-primary).
All interactive elements must have aria-labels if no text is present.
Support keyboard navigation for chat history and inputs.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic gradients. Use subtle radial glows.
Dark mode is default. Light mode is secondary (or hidden if not requested, but toggle exists).
Code blocks must use a distinct background (e.g., #1e1e20) with syntax highlighting.
Input areas should feel 'floating' with backdrop-blur.
